findings.message: devDependency @types/bun uses the floating 'latest' tag; breaking type changes will surface silently on the next install
Peer dependency typescript uses a broad ^5 range; any future 5.x release with breaking changes will be accepted without explicit review
Root CLAUDE.md and packages/cli/CLAUDE.md are identical; no cli-specific overrides exist, creating silent drift risk if either file is updated independently

Discovery workflow uses /api/skills?q=QUERY (line 32) but API Reference table documents the search endpoint as /api/skills/search?q=QUERY (line 178); the two paths contradict each other within the same file
Vague quantifier 'relevant' used without definition; agent cannot deterministically apply the filter
Vague qualifier 'good' used without definition; agent cannot determine when a skill qualifies as good
Vague phrase 'best practices' used; the parenthetical examples help but do not remove the ambiguity of what constitutes best practice
Skill instructs use of npx without a pinned version of skills-installer; a compromised npm release would execute arbitrary code in the user environment
Skill instructs agent to issue outbound curl GET requests to an external registry on every non-trivial task invocation; external dependency for core agent functionality

Discovery workflow uses /api/skills?q=QUERY (line 32) but API Reference table documents the search endpoint as /api/skills/search?q=QUERY (line 178); the two paths contradict each other within the same file
Vague quantifier 'relevant' used without definition; agent cannot deterministically apply the filter — Line 136 reads: 'Show 3-5 most relevant results maximum' — no criterion defined for relevance

Vague qualifier 'good' used without definition; agent cannot determine when a skill qualifies as good — Line 141 reads: 'Offer to help directly if no good skill exists or user declines' — 'good' is undefined

Vague phrase 'best practices' used; the parenthetical examples help but do not remove the ambiguity of what constitutes best practice — Line 21 reads: 'best practices matter (testing, deployment, APIs, documentation)' — 'best practices' is underspecified

Skill instructs use of npx without a pinned version of skills-installer; a compromised npm release would execute arbitrary code in the user environment — Line 99: npx skills-installer install @owner/repo/skill-name — no version pin on skills-installer

Skill instructs agent to issue outbound curl GET requests to an external registry on every non-trivial task invocation; external dependency for core agent functionality — Line 32: curl "https://claude-plugins.dev/api/skills?q=QUERY&limit=20&offset=0"
devDependency @types/bun uses the floating 'latest' tag; breaking type changes will surface silently on the next install — "@types/bun": "latest" in devDependencies
Peer dependency typescript uses a broad ^5 range; any future 5.x release with breaking changes will be accepted without explicit review — "typescript": "^5" in peerDependencies

Root CLAUDE.md and packages/cli/CLAUDE.md are identical; no cli-specific overrides exist, creating silent drift risk if either file is updated independently — packages/cli/CLAUDE.md is byte-for-byte identical to CLAUDE.md at repo root
